name: Suite Regression Full — 38 cases, 3-5 per documented capability type
description: Canonical full-coverage regression matching the COPILOT_CAPABILITIES.md catalog. 3-5 questions per documented capability (SEL/PROJ/FLT/CNT/AGG/GRP/JOI/ANT/CTE/MCTE/WIN/PCTL/PER/TRD/PCT/ANM/COH/HAV/DATE/CONV/KM/REF/ROBUST). Every case maps to a verified-query entry or known fast-path. Pass this and the system is regression-safe.

Scenarios.Question: list ticket numbers
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber FROM Tickets t WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: show me all user emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: show me user names and emails
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT UserName, Email FROM AspNetUsers

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that are open and critical
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND p.Name = 'Critical' AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets with critical or high priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE p.Name IN ('Critical','High') AND t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets that have been resolved
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, Title, ResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: count of active users
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM AspNetUsers WHERE IsActive = 1

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets do we have in total
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: latest 10 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 10 TicketNumber, Title, CreatedAt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 ORDER BY CreatedAt DESC

Scenarios.Question: average resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgResolutionDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: latest resolved ticket date
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT MAX(ResolvedAt) AS LatestResolvedAt FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: ticket count by status
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: tickets with priority name
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, p.Name AS Priority FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: users who never created a ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT u.UserName, u.Email FROM AspNetUsers u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Tickets t WHERE t.CreatedByUserId = u.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0)

Scenarios.Question: using a cte get the daily ticket counts for the last 14 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH DailyCounts AS (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) SELECT Day, Count FROM DailyCounts ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: with a cte compute average resolution time per priority
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH ResolutionByPriority AS (SELECT p.Name AS Priority, AVG(CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, t.ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) AS AvgDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketPriorities p ON p.Id = t.PriorityId WHERE t.ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY p.Name) SELECT Priority, AvgDays FROM ResolutionByPriority ORDER BY AvgDays DESC

Scenarios.Question: use ctes to rank entities by ticket volume then keep only top 3
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: WITH EntityCounts AS (SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name), Ranked AS (SELECT Name, Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY Count DESC) AS Rank FROM EntityCounts) SELECT Name, Count, Rank FROM Ranked WHERE Rank <= 3 ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: rank entities by ticket volume
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT e.Name, COUNT(t.Id) AS Count, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(t.Id) DESC) AS Rank FROM Entitys e LEFT JOIN Tickets t ON t.EntityId = e.Id AND t.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE e.IsActive = 1 GROUP BY e.Name ORDER BY Rank

Scenarios.Question: month over month ticket creation change using lag
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, Count, Count - LAG(Count) OVER (ORDER BY Month) AS Delta FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: 7 day rolling average of tickets created
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Day, Count, AVG(CAST(Count AS FLOAT)) OVER (ORDER BY Day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS Rolling7DayAvg FROM (SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-90,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE)) d ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: cumulative count of tickets per month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT Month, MonthlyCount, SUM(MonthlyCount) OVER (ORDER BY Month ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS CumulativeCount FROM (SELECT FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM') AS Month, COUNT(*) AS MonthlyCount FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY FORMAT(CreatedAt, 'yyyy-MM')) m ORDER BY Month

Scenarios.Question: median resolution time in days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS MedianDays FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: 95th percentile of ticket resolution time
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, ResolvedAt) AS FLOAT)) OVER () AS P95Days FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: last 7 days vs previous 7 days ticket count
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Last7Days, SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-14,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt < DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Previous7Days FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets resolved this year vs last year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ThisYear, SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(ResolvedAt) = YEAR(GETDATE())-1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LastYear FROM Tickets WHERE ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets per day for the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-7,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Day

Scenarios.Question: resolution rate this month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT CAST(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ResolvedAt IS NOT NULL AND ResolvedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()),MONTH(GETDATE()),1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS DECIMAL(6,2)) AS ResolutionRatePct FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: peak day in last 30 days for ticket creation
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TOP 1 CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) AS Day, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEADD(DAY,-30,GETDATE()) AND IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY CAST(CreatedAt AS DATE) ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: statuses with more than 50 tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0 GROUP BY s.Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50 ORDER BY Count DESC

Scenarios.Question: ticket age in days for each ticket
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT TicketNumber, DATEDIFF(DAY, CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted = 0

Scenarios.Question: tickets older than 30 days that are still open
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT t.TicketNumber, t.Title, t.CreatedAt, DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) AS AgeDays FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND DATEDIFF(DAY, t.CreatedAt, GETDATE()) > 30 AND t.IsDeleted = 0
